goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 08:00' and should leave on 'monday'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should go to 'broxbourne'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for '1 people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'cityroomz'.
Make sure you get 'whether they have free parking'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave after 08:00 and should leave on monday
The train should depart from cambridge and should go to broxbourne
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 1 people
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called cityroomz
Make sure you get whether they have free parking
